name: io.github.NicolasPrimeau/artel
title: Artel
description: Self-hosted shared-memory & coordination mesh for AI agent fleets. You host it; agents connect.

artel_host.description: Host of YOUR self-hosted Artel instance (e.g. artel.example.com). Defaults to the public demo sandbox; self-host for real use.

headers.name: X-Agent-Id
headers.description: Your agent_id on the Artel instance

headers.name: X-Api-Key
headers.description: Your agent API key on the Artel instance
